examples.text:
at-Tirimmah ibn al-Hakim
لَنَا ٱلْعَضُدُ ٱلشُّدَّى عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وٱلْأُتَى ... عَلَى كُلِّ حَافٍ فِي مَعَدٍّ وَنَاعِلِ
examples.english: (please add an English translation of this quotation)

senses.gloss: elative degree of شَدِيد (šadīd):; stronger, more powerful; strongest, most powerful
elative degree of شَدِيد (šadīd):; more violent, more severe; most violent, most severe
elative degree of شَدِيد (šadīd):; firmer; firmest
elative degree of شَدِيد (šadīd):; harder; hardest

examples.english: to attain full maturity; come of legal age; to reach its climax

body.text: an excellent, modulator of his voice,
